regions.why: Crude oil is falling and approaching pre-conflict lows, with WTI down nearly $4. Saskatchewan prices have already dropped 10¢ this week, but retail typically lags wholesale by 2–5 days. Further declines likely as the trend continues.
regions.advice: Top off today, fill rest by Fr
